templates.name: SLI Impact Detected for Customer Resources
templates.template: SLI '{slo_sli_id}' has {impacted_resources} impacted resources under subscription '{subscription_id}' in region '{region}' for customer '{customer_name}'. Impact window: {earliest_impact_start} – {latest_impact_end} ({total_impact_duration_min} min). Avg value: {avg_value_across_windows}, Min value: {min_value_across_windows}.
templates.extracted_when: SLI monitoring detects one or more impacted resources for a specific SLI in a subscription and region.

templates.name: Severe SLI Degradation for Customer Resources
templates.template: SLI '{slo_sli_id}' under subscription '{subscription_id}' in region '{region}' for customer '{customer_name}' shows severe degradation: avg value {avg_value_across_windows}, min value {min_value_across_windows} (near-zero indicates total failure). {impacted_resources} resources impacted for {total_impact_duration_min} min ({earliest_impact_start} – {latest_impact_end}). Severity: {severity}.
templates.extracted_when: The average or minimum SLI value across monitoring windows drops to near-zero levels, indicating severe or total service failure rather than partial degradation.

templates.name: Multiple SLI Breach for Customer Resources
templates.template: Subscription '{subscription_id}' in region '{region}' for customer '{customer_name}' has {sli_count} distinct SLIs breached: {sli_list}. Impact window: {earliest_impact_start} – {latest_impact_end}. Total impacted resources: {total_impacted_resources}.
templates.extracted_when: Multiple distinct SLIs (different SLO_SliId values) are breached for the same subscription and region in overlapping time windows, indicating a broader systemic issue rather than an isolated SLI failure.

templates.name: Cross-Subscription SLI Impact for Customer Resources
templates.template: SLI '{slo_sli_id}' is breached across {subscription_count} subscriptions for customer '{customer_name}': {subscription_list}. Combined: {total_impacted_resources} impacted resources, impact window {earliest_impact_start} – {latest_impact_end}.
templates.extracted_when: The same SLI (same SLO_SliId) is breached across multiple subscriptions under the same customer, indicating that the issue is not subscription-specific but likely a platform-level or customer-wide problem.

templates.name: Cross-Region SLI Impact for Customer Resources
templates.template: SLI '{slo_sli_id}' is breached across {region_count} regions for customer '{customer_name}': {region_list}. Affected subscriptions: {subscription_list}. Combined: {total_impacted_resources} impacted resources, impact window {earliest_impact_start} – {latest_impact_end}. This pattern suggests a widespread platform issue rather than a region-specific or customer-specific problem.
templates.extracted_when: The same SLI is breached across multiple distinct regions, indicating a widespread platform issue. Detected by grouping rows by the Region field when there are multiple distinct region values for the same SLI.

templates.name: Cross-Customer Regional SLI Impact
templates.template: SLI '{slo_sli_id}' is breached across {impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions (cross-customer) in region '{region}'. {total_impacted_resources} resources impacted over {total_impact_duration_min} min ({earliest_impact_start} – {latest_impact_end}). Avg value: {avg_value_across_windows}. Other customers are experiencing degradation in the same region where the primary customer has resources.
templates.extracted_when: The multicustomer SLI query shows the same SLI breached across 3 or more subscriptions (belonging to different customers) in the same region, indicating a regional platform issue that may spill over to the primary customer.

templates.name: Cross-Customer Multi-SLI Regional Degradation
templates.template: Region '{region}' has {sli_count} distinct SLIs breached across customers: {sli_list}. {impacted_subscriptions} subscriptions and {total_impacted_resources} resources affected. This broad regional degradation across multiple SLIs indicates a systemic platform issue — primary customer resources in this region face elevated spill-over risk.
templates.extracted_when: The multicustomer SLI query shows multiple distinct SLIs breached across customers in the same region, indicating broad regional degradation rather than a single-SLI anomaly.
